title: Midpoint
content:
The thin, feathery blue
        egg-shell curtains gently tossing,
        the tin smile
        of the roof armada
        its metal armour flashing
        to inch their shingle way
        into escalade-escadrille formation
        and leathery sky.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Midpoint"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
